query:
INSERT INTO outreach_campaigns (leadId, leadName, leadEmail, subject, body, tone, outreachStatus, generatedByAi, sentAt, openedAt, repliedAt, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 'Sam Altman', 'sam@openai.com', 'Partnership Opportunity: Enterprise AI Infrastructure', 'Hi Sam,

Congratulations on OpenAI''s continued momentum. As you scale enterprise offerings, I wanted to share how our platform can help streamline your API integration pipeline and improve developer onboarding.

We''ve helped similar AI companies reduce integration time by 40%. Would you be open to a 15-minute call next week?

Best regards', 'professional', 'opened', 1, '2026-02-28 10:00:00', '2026-02-28 14:30:00', NULL, '2026-02-28 09:00:00'),

(3, 'Michael Truell', 'michael@anysphere.inc', 'Scaling Cursor: Developer Tools Integration', 'Hey Michael,

Love what you''re building with Cursor — $500M ARR is incredible. As you scale the enterprise offering, we''d love to explore how our developer analytics can help you understand adoption patterns and optimize the onboarding experience.

We work with several developer tool companies and have seen 3x improvement in activation rates. Interested in a quick chat?

Cheers', 'friendly', 'replied', 1, '2026-03-01 09:00:00', '2026-03-01 11:00:00', '2026-03-01 16:00:00', '2026-03-01 08:00:00'),

(5, 'Ali Ghodsi', 'ali@databricks.com', 'Data Pipeline Optimization for Enterprise Scale', 'Dear Ali,

With Databricks processing massive datasets for 15,000+ customers, optimizing data pipeline efficiency is critical. Our platform has helped enterprise data companies reduce pipeline latency by 60% while cutting infrastructure costs.

I''d welcome the opportunity to share a brief case study relevant to your scale. Would Tuesday or Wednesday work for a 20-minute call?

Regards', 'professional', 'sent', 1, '2026-02-26 10:00:00', NULL, NULL, '2026-02-26 09:00:00'),

(8, 'Arvind Jain', 'arvind@glean.com', 'Enterprise AI Search: Complementary Solutions', 'Hi Arvind,

Glean''s approach to enterprise AI search is impressive — especially the agentic capabilities. We see a strong synergy between our data enrichment platform and Glean''s search infrastructure.

Several of our mutual customers have asked about deeper integration. Would you be open to exploring a partnership?

Best', 'professional', 'replied', 1, '2026-02-27 11:00:00', '2026-02-27 14:00:00', '2026-02-28 09:00:00', '2026-02-27 10:00:00'),

(11, 'Paul Copplestone', 'paul@supabase.com', 'Open Source Collaboration: Backend Infrastructure', 'Hey Paul,

As a fellow open-source advocate, I''m excited about Supabase''s growth to 2M+ developers. We''ve been building complementary tooling that integrates natively with Postgres-based backends.

Would love to explore how we can create a better developer experience together. Coffee chat?

Cheers', 'casual', 'opened', 1, '2026-03-02 10:00:00', '2026-03-02 15:00:00', NULL, '2026-03-02 09:00:00'),

(15, 'David Chevalier', 'david@surfe.com', 'CRM Integration: Boosting Sales Productivity', 'Hi David,

Surfe''s LinkedIn-CRM bridge is solving a real pain point for sales teams. We''ve been working on complementary lead enrichment tools that could enhance Surfe''s data accuracy.

Our customers report 35% better lead-to-opportunity conversion with enriched data. Interested in a quick demo?

Best', 'friendly', 'sent', 1, '2026-02-25 14:00:00', NULL, NULL, '2026-02-25 13:00:00'),

(20, 'Alina Vandenberghe', 'alina@chilipiper.com', 'Revenue Operations: Scheduling + Lead Scoring Synergy', 'Hi Alina,

Chili Piper''s scheduling automation is a game-changer for revenue teams. We''ve identified a powerful integration opportunity: combining our intent scoring with Chili Piper''s routing to prioritize high-intent leads for instant booking.

This could increase your customers'' conversion rates by 25%+. Would you be open to a partnership discussion?

Best regards', 'professional', 'replied', 1, '2026-02-28 09:00:00', '2026-02-28 11:00:00', '2026-03-01 10:00:00', '2026-02-28 08:00:00'),

(23, 'Bethany Stachenfeld', 'bethany@sendspark.com', 'Video + Intent Data: Personalized Outreach at Scale', 'Hey Bethany,

Sendspark''s personalized video messaging is exactly what modern sales teams need. We''ve been exploring how combining video engagement data with intent scoring could create a powerful outreach signal.

Imagine knowing which prospects watched your video 3x and visited pricing — that''s the integration we''re building. Interested?

Cheers', 'friendly', 'opened', 1, '2026-02-27 10:00:00', '2026-02-27 16:00:00', NULL, '2026-02-27 09:00:00');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2LE5xphD8smrius.5ffa7e6227f0 --database JhbpQq73m6yNTXPUtViPh3 --execute
